name: local-ai-llm
description: Bare-metal local AI LLM monitor, portal, and Ollama control API for multi-GPU Ubuntu hosts.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('No transpilation required: Node 24 runs TypeScript via native type stripping.')"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "console.log('Static type checking is optional; run tsc --noEmit if TypeScript is installed.')"
